commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair target remains; the next action is maintainer approval or requested wording changes for the trust-boundary policy.; Needs attention: No code execution or fixture content is added, but the diff changes a skill-publishing trust-boundary policy and needs maintainer approval before merge. commands.review_summary:
The branch updates AGENTS.md, specs/dev-seeding.md, and the public-corpus manifest to document authenticated owner-scoped skill publishing and clarify that dummy public-corpus owners are fixture scaffolding, not publisher provenance.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a docs and policy-boundary PR, not a bug report. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the added boundary text while the PR head adds it without changing corpus rows.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair target remains; the next action is maintainer approval or requested wording changes for the trust-boundary policy.

target.title: Document public-corpus skill publishing boundary
target.body:
## Summary

This PR documents the public-corpus skill publishing boundary without adding an installable skill fixture and without creating a curated-fixture exception path.

- keeps direct skill additions to repo/source/seed content rejected
- points `AGENTS.md` to `specs/dev-seeding.md` for the public-corpus ownership boundary
- documents that owner-scoped publishing is the normal path for community/publisher skills
- clarifies that public-corpus dummy seeded owners are fixture scaffolding, not publisher provenance
- removes the proposed `coe-root-cause` corpus row/readable fixture/sync test from this PR, so no skill bypasses owner-scoped publishing

## Trust / security impact

No skill content lands in this branch. Normal community or publisher skills must still use the authenticated owner-scoped `clawhub skill publish` path. Public-corpus refreshes remain maintainer-prepared fixture snapshots with recorded source snapshot, redaction policy, row counts, and validation output.

## Verification

Current head: `b6ac7d8b559544217b388314318c9427eee7fb2d`

```console
$ bun run validate:public-corpus
$ bun scripts/public-corpus/validate-public-corpus.ts
{
  "ok": true,
  "fixture": "fixtures/public-corpus/corpus.jsonl",
  "rowCount": 1250,
  "skillCount": 1000,
  "pluginCount": 250
}
```

```console
$ bun test scripts/public-corpus/validate.test.ts scripts/public-corpus/seed-public-corpus.test.ts
bun test v1.3.14 (0d9b296a)

scripts/public-corpus/seed-public-corpus.test.ts:
(pass) public corpus seed runner > recognizes retryable Convex write conflicts [0.04ms]
(pass) public corpus seed runner > retries retryable batch conflicts before succeeding [0.20ms]
(pass) public corpus seed runner > does not retry non-conflict failures [0.04ms]

scripts/public-corpus/validate.test.ts:
(pass) public corpus fixture validation > accepts clean skill and plugin rows [0.44ms]
(pass) public corpus fixture validation > rejects owner identity fields and raw Convex ids [0.13ms]
(pass) public corpus fixture validation > rejects duplicate slugs within each artifact kind [1.17ms]
(pass) public corpus fixture validation > rejects empty content and secret-like text [0.15ms]
(pass) public corpus fixture validation > rejects raw local absolute paths but allows redacted path placeholders [0.06ms]
(pass) public corpus fixture validation > parses newline-delimited corpus rows [0.22ms]
(pass) public corpus fixture validation > documents the committed fixture path [0.01ms]

 10 pass
 0 fail
 22 expect() calls
Ran 10 tests across 2 files. [86.00ms]
```

```console
$ bun run ci:static
$ bun run check:peers && bun audit --ignore GHSA-rmmr-r34h-pfm5 && bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run deadcode:ci
$ bun scripts/check-peer-deps.ts
peer ok: @auth/core 0.37.4 satisfies @convex-dev/auth (^0.37.0)
bun audit v1.3.14 (0d9b296a)
No vulnerabilities found
$ oxfmt --check
Checking formatting...
All matched files use the correct format.
Finished in 912ms on 845 files using 10 threads.
$ bun run lint:oxlint
$ oxlint --type-aware --tsconfig ./tsconfig.oxlint.json ./src ./convex ./packages/clawhub/src ./packages/clawhub-mod/src ./packages/schema/src
$ bun run deadcode:knip
$ bun run deadcode:files && bun run deadcode:dependencies && bun run deadcode:exports
$ bunx knip@6.8.0 --config knip.config.ts --production --no-progress --reporter compact --files --no-config-hints
$ bunx knip@6.8.0 --config knip.config.ts --production --no-progress --reporter compact --dependencies --no-config-hints
$ KNIP_INCLUDE_TESTS=1 bunx knip@6.8.0 --config knip.config.ts --no-progress --reporter compact --exports --no-config-hints
```
target.author: ghitafilali
